gdpr.body: Kyts uses only essential cookies (login, preferences). By using it you accept the <terms>terms of use</terms> and the <privacy>privacy policy</privacy>.

update.title: New version available
update.body: Refresh to use the newest Kyts.

hint.findAgain: You can find the tutorial later in Settings → Tutorial.

step1.title: Welcome to Kyts!
step1.body: A community-driven map where you can see Estonian fuel prices in real-time. Find the cheapest, contribute yourself.

desc.blue: take a photo of the price totem, AI reads the prices.

step3.title: 1 km rule
step3.body: You can only enter prices when you are less than 1 km from the station. This prevents fake contributions across the country and keeps the data reliable.

step4.title: Contribute, earn badges
step4.body: Your price contributions earn titles (🌱 Tourist → ♾️ Kyts Universe) and raise you on the leaderboard. Turn on Discovery map in Settings and collect all 15 Estonian county badges.

step5.title: Create an account
step5.body: You can report and upvote prices without an account. Logging in unlocks favorite stations, leaderboard position, loyalty card discounts, and cross-device sync. The profile icon is on the top right.

brands.title: Preferred stations
brands.help: Select chains that "Cheapest nearby" prefers. Empty = all.

loyalty.title: Loyalty cards
loyalty.help: Enter the discount in cents per liter (e.g. Alexela loyalty card -4). It is displayed on the map and "Cheapest nearby" uses the discounted price for ranking.

header.title: Your profile
header.logoutConfirm: Are you sure you want to log out?

favorites.title: Favorite stations
favorites.empty: No favorite stations yet. Tap the heart on stations to add them.

discovery.title: Discovery map
discovery.description: See which stations you've discovered. Complete parishes and counties to rise in the Discoverers' leaderboard.
discovery.shareDesc: Others will see which stations you've discovered when they click your name.

app.errorBoundary: Something went wrong. Please refresh the page.

gps.lockedTip: GPS locked — press again to release

discoveryBanner.tapXForAll: Tap X to see all counties

gps.tooFar: You are {{distance}} km from the station. Prices can only be entered at the station (up to {{max}} km).

picker.promptManual: Select the station you're adding prices to:
picker.promptUpdate: Select the station you're updating prices for:

brandMismatch.message: The photo seems to show a {{detected}} station, but you are updating prices for {{station}}. Check if the prices are correct.

scanError.quotaExceeded: AI service limit reached. Try again later or enter prices manually.
scanError.aiUpstreamBusy: AI service is currently overloaded. Try again in a few minutes or enter prices manually.
scanError.noNearbyStation: No fuel station found nearby (within {{max}}km radius). Check GPS permissions or manually select a station.
scanError.noGps: No GPS signal received. Check location permissions and try again.
scanError.noPricesRead: AI could not read prices from the photo. Try directly in front of the totem, avoid reflections, or enter prices manually.
scanError.timeout: AI took too long. Try again or enter prices manually.
scanError.network: Network error. Check your internet connection and try again.
scanError.generic: AI reading failed. Enter prices manually or try again.

submit.choosePrompt: Select a station from the list
submit.takePhoto: Take a photo of the price totem

alert.gpsRequired: GPS location is required to enter a price. Allow location and try again.
alert.tooFar: You are {{distance}} km from the station. Prices can only be entered when you are at the station (up to {{max}} km).

submitError.tooFar: You are too far from the station. Move closer to the station and try again.
submitError.rls: Input failed validation. Check the prices and try again.
submitError.notFound: Station not found. Select the station again and try again.
submitError.generic: Saving failed. Try once more — if it repeats, check your network connection.

error.permission: Location unavailable. Allow the app to use location and try again.
error.timeout: Finding your location takes longer than expected. Try again.
error.unsupported: Your browser does not support geolocation.
error.unavailable: Location could not be found. Try again.

stationDrawer.notEnoughHistory: Not enough history for this fuel.

cheapest.title: Cheapest fuel near you
cheapest.fallbackLocation: Using map location — fresh GPS hasn't arrived yet.
cheapest.empty: No prices found in this radius. Try a larger radius.

error.notFound: Route not found. Try a different destination or check your internet connection.
error.locationMissing: Location not found. Origin is required to plan a route.
error.noStations: No stations with this fuel type found near the route. Try a wider corridor.

leaderboard.title: Leaderboard
leaderboard.discoveryHint: Ranked by counties, then parishes, then stations — all time.

empty.discovery: Nobody has discovered anything yet. Be the first!
empty.activity: No data for this period yet.

cheapestNow.heading: Cheapest right now
cheapestNow.noFresh: No fresh price in the last {{hours}} hours.

contribution.heading: My contribution
contribution.body: You've reported {{count}} prices in the last {{days}} days.
contribution.signIn: Sign in to see your contribution.

feedback.title: Feedback
feedback.intro: Praise, criticism, bug reports, or ideas — all welcome.
feedback.introSignedIn: Your user ID is attached to the message so we can reply if needed.
feedback.introSignedOut: If you expect a reply, sign in first or add your e-mail to the message.

sent.body: Your feedback has reached us. We'll reply if needed.

error.submit: Sending failed. Please try again shortly.

notice.englishOnly: This document is available in Estonian and English only.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.s1:
1. Data controller
Kyts is a community project managed by Mikk Rosin (Estonia) as a private individual. Contact: info@kyts.ee. Website: www.kyts.ee.

s2.title: 2. What data we collect
s2.item1: Account data: email address and a Supabase-generated user ID (if you sign in with Google OAuth or email).
s2.item2: Username: an optional public display name set by you.
s2.item3: Contributions: fuel prices and votes submitted by you (public, linked to your user ID).
s2.item4: Preferences: favorite stations, preferred fuel type, favorite brands, loyalty card discounts — saved to your account.
s2.item5: Technical logs: IP address (temporarily, for rate limiting), error stacks (Sentry), aggregated events (PostHog).

s3.title: 3. What we use the data for
s3.item1: To operate the service (authentication, remembering your preferences).
s3.item2: To prevent abuse (per-IP rate limiting for price scans).
s3.item3: To detect bugs (Sentry — automatically collected stack traces).
s3.item4: To measure usage (PostHog — anonymous aggregates, saves nothing to the browser).

s4.title: 4. Legal bases (GDPR art 6)
s4.item2: Legitimate interest (art 6(1)(f)): security, fraud prevention, service improvement via anonymous statistics.

s5.intro:
5. Sub-processors
We use the following services for data processing:
s5.item3: Google — OAuth authentication and Gemini AI (fuel totem image recognition).

privacy.s6:
6. Image processing (AI)
When using camera scanning, the image is securely sent to Google Gemini AI for price detection. The image is not saved on our servers or in the database — it is processed immediately and deleted after the JSON response is returned.
privacy.s7:
7. Location data
The map's "Location" and "Cheapest nearby" features use the browser's GPS only on your device. Your coordinates are not sent to our servers.
privacy.s8:
8. Cookies and local storage
We only use essential cookies: Supabase Auth session tokens (keeps you signed in) and localStorage entries for saving your preferences (e.g. loyalty cards, map style). No cookies are saved for analytics — PostHog operates in memory mode. Therefore, we do not require a consent banner.

s9.title: 9. Retention periods
s9.item1: Account + preferences: until you delete your account.
s9.item2: Price posts: public history is retained so comparisons work.

privacy.s10:
10. Your rights (GDPR)
You have the right to: access, correct, delete, and export your data. You may also object to processing and file a complaint with the Estonian Data Protection Inspectorate (aki.ee). For requests, write to: info@kyts.ee. We respond within 30 days.
privacy.s11:
11. Changes
We will notify you of major changes within the app. The valid version is always this document.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.s1:
1. Service provider
Kyts is a community-based fuel price map managed by Mikk Rosin (Estonia) as a private individual. Contact: info@kyts.ee.
terms.s2:
2. Description of service
Kyts allows users to share and view fuel prices of Estonian stations. Prices are submitted by users and therefore may be outdated, inaccurate, or wrong. The service is provided "as-is", without any warranties regarding accuracy, availability, or suitability.
terms.s3:
3. Account and usage
Creating an account (Google OAuth or email) is optional, but required for submitting prices and voting. One person must only have one account. You are responsible for your account's security.

s4.title: 4. Prohibited conduct
s4.item1: Intentionally submitting false prices or manipulation.
s4.item2: Harassing other users, insulting, or spam.
s4.item3: Automated scraping of the app, reverse engineering or attacks (incl. DDoS, SQL-injection, API abuse).
s4.item4: Using the app for commercial purposes without our written permission (e.g. reselling data, building a competing service based on our data).
s4.item5: Collecting others' personal data via the app.

terms.s5:
5. Content moderation
We reserve the right without prior notice to delete suspicious prices, delete accounts, and block IP addresses if these terms or the law are violated.
terms.s6:
6. User responsibility
The user is responsible for the correctness of their contributed content. By submitting a price, you confirm it corresponds to reality at that moment. A user who intentionally submits false data may bear legal responsibility for misleading other users.
terms.s7:
7. Limitation of liability
Kyts or its operator are not liable for damages resulting from: (a) inaccurate prices, (b) service interruptions, (c) failures of third-party services (Supabase, Vercel, Google Gemini, etc.), (d) technical issues of the user's own device. Maximum liability is limited to zero, as the service is free for users.
terms.s8:
8. Intellectual property
The app's code, design, and the brand "Kyts" belong to the operator. Prices submitted by users are public facts and are not treated as objects of copyright. Map data belongs to OpenStreetMap under the respective license.
terms.s9:
9. Donations
Voluntary donations (e.g. via Buy Me a Coffee) support the maintenance and development of the service. Donations do not grant special rights or extra features in the app and are non-refundable.

s10.withLink:
10. Personal data
The processing of personal data is described in the Privacy Policy (open), which is an integral part of these terms.
s10.plain:
10. Personal data
The processing of personal data is described in the Privacy Policy, which is an integral part of these terms.

terms.s11:
11. Changes to terms
We may update these terms. We will notify you of major changes within the app. Continued use of the service after changes constitutes acceptance of the new terms.
terms.s12:
12. Termination of service
We can suspend or terminate the service at any time. If we terminate the service, we will provide at least 30 days' notice, if possible.
terms.s13:
13. Governing law
The law of the Republic of Estonia applies to these terms. Disputes shall be resolved in the Harju County Court, unless the law provides otherwise.
